items.name: brandTheme
items.description: Override the theme at component level"primary""secondary""tertiary"

slots.note: Slots are not reliably extractable from current MD/index sources.

snippets:
import { Footer, Button, ButtonVariant, ButtonSize, IconName, IconPosition, createToast, Toast, ToastOptions } from "@sanofi-accelerator/elements";

const notify = (args: ToastOptions) => {
  createToast({
    title: "The backToTop props is called.",
    text: "The backToTop props is called.",
    variant: ToastVariant.SUCCESS,
    displayCloseButton: true,
    position: ToastPosition.TOP_END,
    ...args,
  });
};

  const Component = () => (
    <>
      <Toast />
      <Footer>
        <Footer.Top
          brandLogo={{
            src: "https://cdn.prod.accelerator.sanofi/elements/icons/sanofi-logo.svg",
            alt: "sanofi_logo",
            title: "Sanofi",
          }}
          additionalInformation="This is a placeholder for additional informations."
          socialLinks={
            <>
              <Footer.SocialLink platform="instagram" href="https://www.instagram.com/" />
              <Footer.SocialLink platform="linkedIn" href="https://www.linkedin.com/" />
              <Footer.SocialLink platform="x" href="https://www.twitter.com/" />
              <Footer.SocialLink platform="tikTok" href="https://www.tiktok.com/" />
              <Footer.SocialLink platform="youTube" href="https://www.youtube.com/" />
              <Footer.SocialLink platform="facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/" />
            </>
          }
          backToTop={
            <Button
              label="Back to top"
              variant={ButtonVariant.TERTIARY}
              icon={IconName.ARROW_UPWARD}
              iconPosition={IconPosition.END}
              onClick={() => notify({ ...args })}
              inverse
            />
          }
        >
          <Footer.Column>
            <Footer.TitleLink href="#">Category 1</Footer.TitleLink>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 1</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 2</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 3</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 4</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 5</Footer.Link>
          </Footer.Column>
          <Footer.Column>
            <Footer.TitleLink>Category 2</Footer.TitleLink>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 1</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 2</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 3</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 4</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 5</Footer.Link>
          </Footer.Column>
          <Footer.Column>
            <Footer.TitleLink>Category 3</Footer.TitleLink>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 1</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 2</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 3</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 4</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 5</Footer.Link>
          </Footer.Column>
          <Footer.Column>
            <Footer.TitleLink>Category 4</Footer.TitleLink>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 1</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 2</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 3</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 4</Footer.Link>
            <Footer.Link href="#">Link 5</Footer.Link>
          </Footer.Column>
        </Footer.Top>
        <Footer.Bottom legalMention={legalMention}>
          <Footer.BottomLink href="#">Site Map</Footer.BottomLink>
          <Footer.BottomLink href="#">Legal Notice</Footer.BottomLink>
          <Footer.BottomLink href="#">Cookies Policy</Footer.BottomLink>
          <Footer.BottomLink href="#">Privacy & Data Protection</Footer.BottomLink>
          <Footer.BottomLink href="#">Accessibility</Footer.BottomLink>
        </Footer.Bottom>
      </Footer>
    </>
  );

notes: Accessibility terms are present in the docs. Validate exact behavior before production use.

token_bindings.note: Use semantic-token-map.json and component primitive contracts for HTML styling.

fallback_policy.reason: Component has at least one registered primitive contract.
